description: A customer is asking if and when their neighborhood will be upgraded to fiber optic service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the customer's location.

nodes.task_description: Check the internal network expansion roadmap for any planned upgrades in that area.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the neighborhood is scheduled for a fiber upgrade in the next 6-9 months.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer of the planned upgrade timeline and offer to add them to a notification list.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the information and adds the customer to the notification list.
